ab: alpidan no vato o vavahey no karam a irakep sira.
ch: A:老鼠應該要⽤⽯壓式陷阱抓。
en: It is correct to catch mice through rangay.

ab: ori i, ko jyatatenngi, ori ko ji makarakpisya.
ch: B:原來是這樣，我都搞錯了！難怪我都抓不到。
en: No wonder! I am mistaken and that’s why I cannot catch any of them.

ab: nana o on ko imo a mapakapya so ilita do karam.
ch: A:那我再教你怎麼製作陷阱。
en: Then I will teach you how to set up the trap.

ab: noon! yapiya! no mangey ko am makarakep kona so o mawmalalam.
ch: B:好啊！太棒了！這樣我以後就會抓到獵物了。
en: Great! I will be able to catch the prey in the future.

ab: mangap ka so kekezdas, tamangey ta do orata, yamatamek rana.
ch: A:田裡的草太長了，你去拿鐮刀，我們去田裡。
en: The grass in the fields is too tall. Go to the warehouse to take the sickle and let’s go to the fields.

ab: ajin moni payan so kekezdas?
ch: B:鐮刀放在哪裡?
en: Where are the sickles?

ab: ya myan do katangked no yala, si somdep ka am alilin na cita.
ch: A:在簍子的旁邊，你進去倉庫就會看到了。
en: It is next to the round basket. You will see it when you enter the warehouse.

ab: meypepezat ka, tayamatarem o kekezdas.
ch: A:小心。鐮刀很利。
en: Be careful. The sickle is very sharp.

ab: ji mo todey zasagi o ko litan do omow malalam.
ch: A:不要踩到我的陷阱!
en: Don’t step on my trap!

ab: a ji nayanan no mo panlilitan?
ch: B:你的陷阱在哪裡?
en: Where is your trap?

ab: yamyan do teyrahem no kayo.
ch: A:我的陷阱在那棵樹的下面。
en: My trap is under that tree.

ab: moni ma nakem ori?
ch: B:你怎麼會記得?
en: How do you remember?

ab: yamyan so koni singkad jya, ori ko ipakateneng do nayanan.
ch: A:我在這邊有做記號，我知道我的陷阱在哪裡。
en: I make a mark here, so I know where my trap is.

ab: oyam ipanakep so a mong, ya pangain do oyo.
ch: A:這是魚筌，我們放在溪邊捕魚。
en: This is a fish trap which we put beside the river for fishing.

ab: yabo jyamen o manpoy a ipangap so among, tanamen mamasil no pakow yan.
ch: B:我們那邊沒有魚筌，我們都用釣竿抓魚。
en: We don’t have any fish traps there, so we catch fish with a fishing rod.

ab: namen pa jya ni mamasil, sipisa am nanaon mo yaken.
ch: A:我沒有用過釣竿，你下次教我好嗎?
en: I have never used a fishing rod before, would you mind teaching me next time?

ab: noon, nosipisi am, meyhezata mamasil.
ch: B:好啊!我們下次一起去釣魚。
en: Sure! Let’s go fishing together next time.

ab: no ipisaam nanaon ko imo ma pakapya so pangozongan so among.
ch: A:那我下次教你做魚筌。
en: I will teach you how to make a fish trap next time.

ab: ya mey gonagoney o pakowyan mo, vaozen mo, ta nanyakan no among.
ch: A:你的釣竿動了，是不是有魚上鉤了!你快拉起來。
en: Your fishing rod is moving. Isn’t the fish on the hook? Pull it up!

ab: sitai, tayameygona goney avang, tokong yan jya am ngingit sya.
ch: B:等等，船太晃了。我在這邊拉釣竿，你去那邊幫我拿網子來。
en: Wait, the ship is rolling heavily. I am here to pull the fishing rod and you should go there to grab me the net.

ab: a pen mo jya, ta sidongen ko imo am lolo sya.
ch: A:你把魚拉到我這邊。我幫妳拉起來。
en: Pull the fish to my side and I will help you pull it up.

ab: yatey ya pyasicirow ya, ni mapno o karey ta no among.
ch: A:太好了!今天大豐收，魚簍都裝滿了。
en: Great! It is a bumper crop today with full fish baskets.

ab: molitana, kavonong ta sya jira.
ch: B:我們快回去和大家分享。
en: Let’s go back immediately and share it with everyone.
